info.title: Expense Splitter API
info.description: API for managing shared expenses, participants, and payments.

tags.name: Payments
tags.description: Endpoints for payment recording and expense settlement.

tags.name: Friendships
tags.description: Endpoints for friendship management and friend requests.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Endpoints for user authentication and registration.

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: Endpoints for notification management and tracking.

tags.name: Users - Admin
tags.description: Endpoints for user management and administration.

tags.name: Profile
tags.description: Endpoints for user profile management and personal account operations.

tags.name: Expenses
tags.description: Endpoints for expense management and settlement tracking.

put.summary: Set local password (applicable only if the account was created via OAuth2)
put.description: Setting the authenticated user's account password. New access and refresh tokens are issued in cookies and in response body.

403.description: Account linking is required for this operation.

schema.description: RFC 7807 Problem Details response indicating account must be linked.

schema.description: RFC 7807 Problem Details response with 400 Bad Request status.
RFC 7807 Problem Details response with 401 Unauthorized status.

schema.description: Standard RFC 7807 Problem Details response containing error information (type, title, status, detail, instance).

post.description:
Authenticates a user with email and password. Access and refresh tokens are issued in secure httpOnly cookies.

If user's password is marked to be changed, the access token will be generated but will allow only to access these endpoints: - /profile/password (PUT and PATCH for password change/set)
- /auth/logout (allow users to logout)
- /auth/refresh (allow refresh token)

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of the selected expense payments.

Password Set Request.description: Payload used to set OAuth2 user's local password.

newPassword.description: New password provided by the user.

repeatNewPassword.description: Repeated new password for confirmation. Must match newPassword.

Login Response.description: Response returned after successful authentication. Contains JWT access token and refresh token.

accessToken.description: JWT access token used to authorize API requests. Valid for short period (default 1 hour).

refreshToken.description: Refresh token used to obtain a new access token when it expires. Valid for longer period (default 7 days).

Create Payment Request.description: Payload used to register a payment for an expense.

expenseId.description: Expense identifier to which the payment is assigned.

Expense Response.description: Basic expense data returned in listings.

role.description: Role of the user in the expense

expenseDate.description: Date and time when expense was incurred.

expense.description: Expense for which the payment was made.

User Response.description: Basic user data returned by API.

Friendship Request.description: Payload used to create a friendship invitation.

recipientId.description: Identifier of the user receiving the invitation.

Friendship Response.description: Friendship relation details between two users.

requester.description: User who sent the friendship invitation.

recipient.description: User who received the friendship invitation.

deletedAt.description: Soft delete timestamp. Null if not deleted.

Create Expense Request.description: Payload used to create a new expense.

participants.description: Set of participants and their shares.

expenseDate.description: Date and time when expense was incurred.

Expense Participant Request.description: Participant share definition used in expense payloads.

Detailed Expense Response.description: Detailed expense data with participants and audit fields.

role.description: Role of the user in the expense

payer.description: User who paid for the expense.

splitType.description: Method of splitting the expense among participants.

shares.description: List of shares between the participants.

expenseDate.description: Date and time when expense was incurred.

Expense Share Response.description: Share of an expense for single participant.

Register Request.description: Payload used to crate a new user account.

newPassword.description: New password provided by the user.

repeatNewPassword.description: Repeated new password for confirmation. Must match newPassword.

Login Request.description: Payload used to authenticate a user.

Create User Request.description: Payload used to create a new user account by an admin.

newPassword.description: New password provided by the user.

repeatNewPassword.description: Repeated new password for confirmation. Must match newPassword.

Detailed User Response.description: Detailed user data including audit timestamps.

identities.description: User identities linked to external providers.

deletedAt.description: Soft-delete timestamp when account was removed.

User Identity Response.description: Linked OAuth2 user account's identity info.

Update Profile Request.description: Payload used to update user profile fields. All fields are optional. If a field is not provided, the corresponding user attribute will remain unchanged.

Password Change Request.description: Payload used to change user password.

newPassword.description: New password provided by the user.

repeatNewPassword.description: Repeated new password for confirmation. Must match newPassword.

userId.description: User unique identifier who received the notification.

body.example: John Doe paid $50.00 for shared expense.

isRead.description: Whether the notification has been read.

Update Notification Preference Request.description: Payload used to update notification channel preferences. All fields are optional. If a field is not provided, the corresponding preference will remain unchanged.

Notification Preference Response.description: Current notification channel preferences for a user.

Update Expense Request.description: Payload used to update existing expense details. All fields are optional. If a field is not provided, the corresponding expense attribute will remain unchanged.

expenseDate.description: Date and time when expense was incurred.

Update User Request.description: Payload used to update an existing user account by an admin.

Simple User Response.description: Simple user data returned by API. Good for listing users or showing basic profile info.

email.description: User email address. Depends on the implementation, but can be encrypted

bearerAuth.description: USE JWT token obtained from /api/auth/login endpoint or via OAuth2 authorization flow.
